no: Alternatives feels like a thematic copout to me, but eh Because sometimes the vanilla 2 options in BG2 on how to reach Spellhold aren’t enough.Install Alternatives after SimDing0’s Quest Pack.
sum: Adds alternative solutions to key BG2 plot points, letting you resolve major quests in new ways you couldn't before.

advisories.reason: Both modify Shadow Thieves/Aran Linvail content, but Alternatives readme says 'tested with Quest Pack — install Quest Pack first.' Both use safe EXTEND/APPEND on shared area scripts (AR0300, AR0328, AR0329). Narrative overlap only (D0QP chapter 6 Aran assault may trigger on Alternatives path).
advisories.source: Alternatives readme: 'tested on installations that included Quest Pack'; both use EXTEND_TOP/EXTEND_BOTTOM; consistent with Fade partial rating, 2026-03
